Growth Parameters

Lettuce

All
pH5.5-6.0
TDS500-1000
TEMP18-24°C
HUMIDITY50-70%
1-2 hrs pump cycle30 days

All
pH5.5-6.0
TDS500-1000
TEMP18-24°C
HUMIDITY50-70%
1-2 hrs pump cycle30-40 days

Coriander

All
pH5.5-6.0
TDS500-1000
TEMP20-25°C
HUMIDITY60-80%
1-2 hrs pump cycle20-30 days

Basil

Warm/All
pH5.5-6.0
TDS800-1200
TEMP20-25°C
HUMIDITY60-80%
1-2 hrs pump cycle30-60 days

Pudina (Mint)

All
pH5.5-6.5
TDS500-1000
TEMP20-25°C
HUMIDITY60-80%
1-2 hrs pump cycle20-25 days

Money Plant

All (Indoor)
pH6.0-7.0
TDS400-800
TEMP20-28°C
HUMIDITY50-70%
Continuous low pump cycleRoots 1-2 wks

Kale

All
pH5.5-6.5
TDS1000-1200
TEMP18-24°C
HUMIDITY50-70%
1-2 hrs pump cycle30-50 days

Swiss Chard

All
pH6.0-7.0
TDS1000-1400
TEMP18-25°C
HUMIDITY50-70%

Bok Choy

All
pH5.5-6.5
TDS500-1000
TEMP18-24°C
HUMIDITY60-80%
1-2 hrs pump cycle30 days
Open Mobile Dashboard
HydroSense
Access
Professional Grade Monitoring

Grow Smarter with HydroSense

Precision hydroponics for the modern hobbyist. Real-time monitoring, automated nutrient tracking, and environmental control in one high-density interface.

Launch DashboardDocumentation

Smart Nutrients

Real-time TDS and pH monitoring keeps your solution perfectly balanced.

Full Automation

Control pumps, lights, and fans remotely or with intelligent schedules.

Precision Sensors

Track every variable from water temperature to ambient light levels.

How to Build Your System

01

Choose Your Method

Select between NFT, DWC, or Aeroponics depending on your space and goals.

02

Scale Your Reservoir

Choose a non-transparent container. 5-10 gallons is ideal for hobbyists.

03

Install the Electronics

Assemble your ESP32/Arduino sensors for pH, TDS, and temperature.

04

Start Your First Grow

Transplant your seedlings into the system and initiate monitoring.

System Components

  • Submersible Pump (v2.4)
  • Net Pots & Hydro-ton
  • Dual-Stage Air Pump
  • Full-Spectrum LED Matrix
HydroSense

LATENCY: 42ms | SYNC: 10s | FW: v2.4.1-STABLE
